stocks.impact_theory: Neurocrine Biosciences announced a $2.9B all-cash buyout of Soleno at $53/share, a 34% premium. Economic implications: Accelerates development of obesity drug pipeline amid sector M&A wave. Market psychology: Triggers buyout arbitrage and FOMO buying. Historical parallels: Similar to Amgen/Horizonte (2023). Analogies: 1. Ship sold at premium during boom. 2. Inheritance windfall.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Buyout news drove 30%+ surge; X sentiment highly positive with deal buzz; web news confirms $53 target.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy for 3-10% gain to $53-56 close; arb play.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or small for deal break (-10-15%).
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Deal failure on antitrust/shareholder suit, market sell-off.

stocks.justification: Definitive buyout announcement with premium; high volume confirms sentiment shift.

stocks.impact_theory: Fubo released FY26 Adjusted EBITDA outlook $80-100M, targeting $300M by 2028, cash flow positive FY27. Implications: Path to profitability in competitive streaming. Psychology: Relief rally on guidance beat expectations. Parallels: ROKU 2021 turnaround. Analogies: 1. Company turning corner like prodigal son. 2. Diet success after tough years.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Guidance surprise sparked 25% jump; positive X chatter on profitability.

stocks.justification: Strong guidance but execution risks in sector.

stocks.impact_theory: MSTR bought $330M BTC (4,871 coins), holdings near 767k BTC amid BTC rebound. Implications: Leveraged BTC play amplifies crypto sentiment. Psychology: Validates HODL strategy. Parallels: 2021 BTC buys. Analogies: 1. Doubling down on winning horse. 2. Adding chips to poker pot.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: BTC correlation + buy news; X hype on Saylor.

stocks.justification: Tied to volatile crypto, but clear catalyst.

stocks.impact_theory: Analyst (KeyBanc) reiterates $600 PT (64% upside), AI memory demand. Implications: HBM chips critical for AI. Psychology: Validates growth narrative. Parallels: NVDA AI run 2023. Analogies: 1. Fuel for AI rocket. 2. Gold rush pickaxes.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Analyst note + AI tailwinds; positive sector sentiment.

stocks.impact_theory: Conditional approval for trust bank charter + BTC bounce. Implications: Expands services, regulatory greenlight. Psychology: De-risks business. Parallels: 2024 ETF approvals. Analogies: 1. License to print money. 2. Key to new kingdom.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Regulatory win + crypto rebound; bullish X posts.
